title: digitaria ciliaris var. sericea
intro: Digitaria ciliaris var. sericea, commonly known as hairy finger grass, is a perennial grass species. It is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Digitaria ciliaris var. sericea include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves can be used to make a poultice for topical application.
